languages.original_text: "It is rather curious that your cyber-mastiff's model does not entirely conform to classic templates and contains a high percentage of organics. In your opinion, Proctor, is your canid the locus of a machine spirit, or does it remain a living autonomous organism?"

languages.text: "Примечательно, что модель вашего кибермастифа не полностью соответствует классическим шаблонам и содержит в себе весьма большой процент органики. Как вы думаете, проктор, ваш канид — средоточие машинного духа, или все еще живой автономный организм?"

"It is rather curious that your cyber-mastiff's model does not entirely conform to classic templates and contains a high percentage of organics. In your opinion, Proctor, is your canid the locus of a machine spirit, or does it remain a living autonomous organism?"
languages.original_text: "Примечательно, что модель вашего кибермастифа не полностью соответствует классическим шаблонам и содержит в себе весьма большой процент органики. Как вы думаете, проктор, ваш канид — средоточие машинного духа, или все еще живой автономный организм?"

traits.locale_text: "It is rather curious that your cyber-mastiff's model does not entirely conform to classic templates and contains a high percentage of organics. In your opinion, Proctor, is your canid the locus of a machine spirit, or does it remain a living autonomous organism?"

"It is rather curious that your cyber-mastiff's model does not entirely conform to classic templates and contains a high percentage of organics. In your opinion, Proctor, is your canid the locus of a machine spirit, or does it remain a living autonomous organism?"

"It is rather curious that your cyber-mastiff's model does not entirely conform to classic templates and contains a high percentage of organics. In your opinion, Proctor, is your canid the locus of a machine spirit, or does it remain a living autonomous organism?"

languages.text: «Es muy peculiar que el modelo de su cibermastín no coincida exactamente con las plantillas clásicas y contenga un alto porcentaje de material orgánico. En su opinión, Procurador, ¿posee su cánido un espíritu máquina o sigue siendo un organismo vivo autónomo?».
languages.original_text: "It is rather curious that your cyber-mastiff's model does not entirely conform to classic templates and contains a high percentage of organics. In your opinion, Proctor, is your canid the locus of a machine spirit, or does it remain a living autonomous organism?"

traits.locale_text: «Es muy peculiar que el modelo de su cibermastín no coincida exactamente con las plantillas clásicas y contenga un alto porcentaje de material orgánico. En su opinión, Procurador, ¿posee su cánido un espíritu máquina o sigue siendo un organismo vivo autónomo?».

languages.text: 「あなたのサイバー・マスチフのモデルが、古典的な鋳型に完全には合致せず、有機物の比率が高いことは、なかなか興味深いですね。プロクター、あなたのお考えでは、その犬は機械精霊の座なのでしょうか、それとも生きた自律的有機体のままなのでしょうか？」
languages.original_text: "It is rather curious that your cyber-mastiff's model does not entirely conform to classic templates and contains a high percentage of organics. In your opinion, Proctor, is your canid the locus of a machine spirit, or does it remain a living autonomous organism?"

traits.locale_text: 「あなたのサイバー・マスチフのモデルが、古典的な鋳型に完全には合致せず、有機物の比率が高いことは、なかなか興味深いですね。プロクター、あなたのお考えでは、その犬は機械精霊の座なのでしょうか、それとも生きた自律的有機体のままなのでしょうか？」

languages.text: “有趣，你的生化獒犬型号并不完全符合经典模板，且含有高比例的有机物质。监察官，依你之见，你这条獒犬是机魂的载体，还是一个活着的自主有机体？”
languages.original_text: "It is rather curious that your cyber-mastiff's model does not entirely conform to classic templates and contains a high percentage of organics. In your opinion, Proctor, is your canid the locus of a machine spirit, or does it remain a living autonomous organism?"

traits.locale_text: “有趣，你的生化獒犬型号并不完全符合经典模板，且含有高比例的有机物质。监察官，依你之见，你这条獒犬是机魂的载体，还是一个活着的自主有机体？”

languages.text: "Seltsam, dass das Modell Eures Cyber-Mastiffs nicht gänzlich konform mit klassischen Vorlagen ist und einen hohen organischen Anteil hat. Ist Euer Hund in Euren Augen der Sitz eines Maschinengeistes oder ein lebendiger, autonomer Organismus?"
languages.original_text: "It is rather curious that your cyber-mastiff's model does not entirely conform to classic templates and contains a high percentage of organics. In your opinion, Proctor, is your canid the locus of a machine spirit, or does it remain a living autonomous organism?"

traits.locale_text: "Seltsam, dass das Modell Eures Cyber-Mastiffs nicht gänzlich konform mit klassischen Vorlagen ist und einen hohen organischen Anteil hat. Ist Euer Hund in Euren Augen der Sitz eines Maschinengeistes oder ein lebendiger, autonomer Organismus?"

languages.text: « Il est plutôt curieux que votre modèle de cyber-mastiff ne se conforme pas entièrement aux schémas classiques, et se constitue de nombreux composants organiques. À votre avis, proctor, votre animal est-il le réceptacle d'un esprit de la machine, ou bien est-il encore un organisme vivant autonome ? »
languages.original_text: "It is rather curious that your cyber-mastiff's model does not entirely conform to classic templates and contains a high percentage of organics. In your opinion, Proctor, is your canid the locus of a machine spirit, or does it remain a living autonomous organism?"

traits.locale_text: « Il est plutôt curieux que votre modèle de cyber-mastiff ne se conforme pas entièrement aux schémas classiques, et se constitue de nombreux composants organiques. À votre avis, proctor, votre animal est-il le réceptacle d'un esprit de la machine, ou bien est-il encore un organisme vivant autonome ? »

languages.text: "Siber mastifinizin modelinin klasik şablonlara tam olarak uymaması ve yüksek oranda organik madde içermesi oldukça merak uyandırıcı. Üsteğmen, sizce köpeğiniz bir makine ruhunun merkezi mi yoksa canlı özerk bir organizma olmaya devam mı ediyor?"
languages.original_text: "It is rather curious that your cyber-mastiff's model does not entirely conform to classic templates and contains a high percentage of organics. In your opinion, Proctor, is your canid the locus of a machine spirit, or does it remain a living autonomous organism?"

traits.locale_text: "Siber mastifinizin modelinin klasik şablonlara tam olarak uymaması ve yüksek oranda organik madde içermesi oldukça merak uyandırıcı. Üsteğmen, sizce köpeğiniz bir makine ruhunun merkezi mi yoksa canlı özerk bir organizma olmaya devam mı ediyor?"
